title: Overhead Phone Flash
sourceTitle: Overhead Phone Flash Reference Portrait Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image photoreal overhead phone-flash portrait for user-owned face reference before cute cafe-uniform phone snapshot styling, preserving fictional adult creator with soft black bob hair, white high rounded collar, pale pink hair ornament, long-sleeve modest cafe apron and covered neckline. Subject: fictional adult creator with soft black bob hair, white high rounded collar, pale pink hair ornament, long-sleeve modest cafe apron and covered neckline keeps the uploaded portrait identity, facial structure, face shape, hair style and color, skin tone, authentic eyes, natural bone structure, and real skin texture while being restyled into a modest cute cafe-uniform-inspired close-up. Scene: small kitchen corner at night, phone held overhead near the face, cool flash highlights and dense cinematic shadows, wardrobe reads as cute cafe uniform rather than sets the dim interior setting with cool blue-white phone flash, cinematic teal shadows, dense edge blur, and an intimate near-face mobile-camera feeling. Composition: Preserve the uploaded face identity while using a very close overhead phone-camera angle: camera points downward from above near the face, subject gazes straight up into the lens, face and collar stay dominant, torso remains covered, and wide-phone perspective creates a candid near-camera crop. Signature Elements: Overhead phone angle, direct upward gaze, cool blue-white flash, teal shadows, modest cafe-uniform styling, high rounded collar, covered torso, authentic face identity, and soft enigmatic expression. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Cool blue-white flash, teal shadows, pastel cafe-uniform accents, soft pink details, natural skin tones, dark interior edges, and restrained low-light contrast. Lighting: Intense cool phone flash with slightly blown-out facial highlights, dense shadows around the frame, teal ambient falloff, and realistic flash reflections in eyes and fabric. Camera: Overhead close-up phone-camera wide perspective, very near the face, angled downward, shallow edge softness, authentic mobile snapshot distortion without face warping. Materials: High rounded white collar, long puff sleeves, ruffled apron, modest cafe-uniform fabric, small pink spatula or hair ornament, real hair detail, natural eyes, and candid flash-lit skin. Restrictions: Use an adult subject only. Preserve the uploaded identity when provided. Keep wardrobe modest and covered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
